name: Roast Pork Lo Mein
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------SAUCE MIX-------------------------
6 tbsp Oyster sauce
- can add more as per taste
1/2 tsp Sugar
1/8 tsp Pepper, heavy dash
Note: Dried Noodles .... 5 cups cooked = 1 lb
Fresh Noodles .... 2 1/2 cups cooked = 1 lb
- Heat Wok
- Add oil and let heat
- Add salt; stir
- Add pork & sherry; stir fry quickly
- Add cabbage, bean sprouts, & waterchestnuts; stir fry for 45 seconds.
- Add stock; place noodles on top
- Cover and cook for 1 minute.
- Uncover and stir
- Add "sauce mix"; stir until evenly seasoned
- Serve!
